# kSCDynamicStoreUseSessionKeys

**Global Variable**

All keys added or set into the dynamic store should be per-session keys.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSCDynamicStoreUseSessionKeys: CFString
```
title: kSCDynamicStoreUseSessionKeys
